_comment: DESK SOURCE OF TRUTH. Edit this when the book changes; the GitHub Action recomputes data.json with live prices on a schedule. Equity values are auto-priced from Yahoo; cash/buying_power/realized/options are desk-set; briefs are desk posts.

briefs.body: Two-sided weekend binary. IF the Iran deal is SIGNED: sell AAL $16C into the 2nd push ($0.85-1.05), MU starter $35-40, energy stays banned, HOOD re-add waits for FOMC. IF it slips/dies: cut AAL at the open bid, drones whipsaw back (no chase), honor every stop.
HOOD 86.75 (b/e) - INTC 114.25 (b/e) - RGTI 19.00 - SOFI 15.15 - NU 10.95 - NVDA 189.00 - SPY core never auto-sold. AAL $16C is alert-only (cut at $0.26 or deal-collapse).
Main card. 2nd $75 SPY core tranche AFTER the statement. No new options pre-FOMC unless AAL exits first.
